items.title: Fairmark Ltd — LTD registration in 4 days
items.summary: Helped a Lagos-based fintech founder register a private LTD with 1M share capital plus TIN setup, ahead of a partner-bank deadline.
items.outcome: Registered LTD in 4 working days; bank account opened the following week.

story.challenge: The founder needed a private LTD registered before a partner bank's onboarding deadline — eight working days away.
story.approach: Pre-flight check on name availability, share structure recommendations for fintech, fast-track CAC submission, and a TIN application bundled in.
story.result: Certificate delivered in 4 working days; bank account opened the following week; founder shipped their MVP the same month.

items.title: Mustard Seed Foundation — Incorporated Trustees
items.summary: End-to-end Incorporated Trustees registration for an Abuja-based foundation — constitution drafting, trustee verification, newspaper publication and CAC filings.
items.outcome: Registered Incorporated Trustees; foundation now eligible for institutional grants.

story.challenge: A foundation operating informally for two years needed proper IT status to receive grants from international donors.
story.approach: Drafted constitution against CAC guidelines, ran trustee verifications, coordinated newspaper publication, and pre-empted common rejection causes.
story.result: Approved on first submission; now actively receiving donor grants.

items.title: Bytestack Studio — internal ops tool
items.summary: Custom internal operations dashboard for a hybrid London/Lagos studio — project tracking, client portal, invoicing.
items.outcome: Replaced 3 SaaS subscriptions; team saved ~10 hours/week on admin.

story.challenge: Studio team was juggling Notion, Trello, and a separate invoicing tool — none of them sharing data.
story.approach: Discovery workshop, single Next.js app with Postgres, role-based access, invoicing module wired to client portal.
story.result: One source of truth; ~10 hours/week reclaimed; cancelled 3 SaaS subscriptions.

items.title: Pathway HQ — diaspora services mobile app
items.summary: Cross-platform mobile app helping Nigerians in the diaspora coordinate services back home — registrations, remittance, document handling.
items.outcome: Live on both App Store and Play Store; 2,000+ downloads in first quarter.

story.challenge: Founders needed a single mobile experience to serve diaspora customers across multiple service types.
story.approach: React Native build, modular service catalogue, push-notification status updates, integrated chat handoff to a WhatsApp-style support flow.
story.result: Shipped to both stores in 14 weeks; 2,000+ downloads and a 4.6 average rating in Q1.

items.title: Halima Studio — boutique storefront
items.summary: Modern, mobile-first storefront with WhatsApp checkout for a Kano-based boutique.
items.outcome: Online orders went from zero to 30+ in the first month.

story.challenge: All sales happened over WhatsApp DMs; no catalogue, no scalable way to share.
story.approach: Clean Next.js site with product gallery, WhatsApp-deep-link checkout, simple admin for the owner to update stock.
story.result: 30+ online orders in the first month; significantly less manual back-and-forth.

items.title: Sahel Logistics — brand & UI refresh
items.summary: Brand refresh and UI design system for a regional logistics company — covering web, mobile and field operator dashboards.
items.outcome: Unified visual identity across customer site, driver app and ops dashboard.

story.challenge: Three products, three different design languages — confusing for both customers and ops staff.
story.approach: Audit of existing surfaces, redesigned brand foundations (type, colour, voice), shipped a shared Figma library and tokens.
story.result: One coherent identity across customer-facing and internal tools; faster handoff for future features.
